system.notes: Automated robotic weapon mount (Ares Sentry): Intelligence 6 (+1 per added sensor), Firearms Skill 5 (+1 per 5,000¥ or extra sensor), integral thermographic + pulse-radar sensors. Initiative 15+1D6 (raise to 20+2D6 for 10,000¥ or 25+3D6 for 20,000¥). Mounts a weapon up to a light machine gun; tripod or 300° rotation; Barrier Rating 12. Standard cost 22,000¥ +10% for customization; extra sensors 2,000¥; incline/decline targeting 3,000¥. Plus the weapon, ammo, and recoil comp. Street Index 4. Fields of Fire p.46.
